classification.recommendedRunner: CLI/Node integration tests (dedicated Vitest integration config), not Playwright. The spec never opens a page; every active behavior is a child-process/warehouse assertion (`packages/e2e/cypress/cli/dbt/cli.cy.ts:25-263`). The port contract also says browserless CLI coverage does not belong in Playwright (`packages/e2e/migration/playwright/prompts/port-file.md:17-18`).
classification.persistentMutation: Yes — `dbt run` replaces/materializes tables in `SEED_SCHEMA`, `lightdash generate` rewrites model YAML, and dbt commands update ignored `target/`/`logs/` artifacts (`packages/e2e/cypress/cli/dbt/cli.cy.ts:25-36,39-241`; `packages/cli/src/handlers/generate.ts:128-175`; `examples/full-jaffle-shop-demo/dbt/dbt_project.yml:15-24`).
classification.sharedPreviewDualRunSafe: No. The preview is unused, but Cypress and the port would collide if they share the same Postgres schema or checkout. CI currently gives each dbt matrix job a schema, but not separate Cypress/Node schemas inside one job (`.github/workflows/pr.yml:753-820`).
classification.difficulty: 11/18 — persistent/shared state 3; browser interaction complexity 0; environment/external dependencies 3; synchronization/flakiness 2; authentication/authorization 0; cross-file infrastructure 3.

classification.recommendedRunner: Playwright test runner as a Node-only CLI integration suite; do not request a browser/page fixture.
